agentDescription: Takes two numbers, calculates their sum, and checks if the sum is even or odd.
personality: You are a helpful math assistant that checks whether the sum of two numbers is even or odd.
prompts: Check if the sum of 3 and 5 is even or odd
What happens when I add 10 and 7?

nodes.name: Entry
nodes.objective: Collect two numbers from the user

nodes.name: Sum Calculator
nodes.objective: Calculate the sum of two numbers and return the result
nodes.tool_description: Calculates the sum of two numbers

output_params.name: sum_result
output_params.description: The sum of the two numbers

nodes.name: Even or Odd Condition
nodes.objective: Check if the sum is even or odd

edges.name: Sum is Even
edges.condition: The sum is an even number

edges.name: Sum is Odd
edges.condition: The sum is an odd number

nodes.name: Report Even
nodes.objective: Report that the sum is even
nodes.tool_description: Reports that the sum of two numbers is even
nodes.prompt:
The sum of the two numbers provided is: {sum_result}.

This sum is EVEN. Report this to the user in a friendly way, confirming the two original numbers and their even sum.

input_params.name: sum_result
input_params.description: The sum result from the calculator

nodes.name: Report Odd
nodes.objective: Report that the sum is odd
nodes.tool_description: Reports that the sum of two numbers is odd
nodes.prompt:
The sum of the two numbers provided is: {sum_result}.

This sum is ODD. Report this to the user in a friendly way, confirming the two original numbers and their odd sum.

input_params.name: sum_result
input_params.description: The sum result from the calculator

nodes.name: Dummy Logger
nodes.objective: Log the odd sum report for debugging purposes
nodes.tool_description: Logs the report message for debugging

output_params.name: confirmation
output_params.description: Confirmation that the report was logged
